MINI MINUTES: Cause on Cal this day AUG-05-2002 in Dept. 218 for default prove-up hearing. Declarations in lieu of testimony accepted by the court. Court Grants Judgment for Plaintiff (see imaged Order filed this day) Court will permit further declartion re attorney fees for possible amended order. Damon Fisk, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff.
